titleStmt.title: SII 9.655: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 655. (A.R. No. 433 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE ROAD-SIDE TO THE WEST OF THE TANK CALLED SANNAKEREKATTE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Kārtika, śu. 1 corresponding to A.D. 1554 October 27 Saturday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. While Mallapa-Voḍeya was the ruler of Bārakūra-rājya, under the orders of Sadāśiva-Nāyaka (of Keḷadi), who had been appointed governor of the Tuḷu-rājya by the king, Timmayyaseṭṭi, nephew (aḷiya) of Hosabuseṭṭi, is stated to have purchased a plot of land, constructed a maṭha thereon and having purchased from Aṇṇa-Uḍupa a brahmadāya land made a gift of the same for the maintenance of the chhatra attached to the maṭha. The record is incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraccuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyaEvery line begins
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaru
śa 1476 saṁda Ānaṁdasaṁvatsarada kārtika śuddha 1 li śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivarāyamahārāyaru vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalli ci
ttavisi sakala sāṁbrājyavanāḷutiha kāladalli Avara nirūpadiṁda sadāśivarāyanāya
karū tuḷurājya maḍikoṁḍu Avara nirūpadiṁda mallappapoḍēru bārukūru siṁhāsana
va Āḷuva kāladalli toḷahara baḷiya Allāḷapaseṭṭiya hosabuseṭṭiya Aḷi
ya tiṁmayyaseṭṭiyu basarūra paḍuvakēriya voḷage halaru seṭṭikārara kai
yallū Arthaparichēdyavāgi koṭṭu mūlaparichēdyavāgi tegedukoṁḍā maṭha
da catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu hoḷeya baḷiyavara maṭhadiṁda paḍuvalu teṁ
kalu baḷagāra baḷiyavara dharmada kaṭṭeyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu rāja
bīdiyiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu kauḍici baḷiyavara maṭhadiṁda teṁkalu yiṁ
ttī cattussīme voḷaguḷa maṭhava kaṭṭisi svasti koṁḍu chatrakke biṭa vivara
Allāḷaseṭṭiya hosabuseṭṭiya Aḷiya tiṁmayyaseṭṭige kaṁdavarada grāmi
ṇi Aṁṇauḍuparu koṭṭa biḍāruvārada patrada kramaveṁteṁdare nāu
baddha bra(ṁ)hmadāyada mūlladabāḷu Eraḍu Adhivāsadoḷage kuruṁba
ḷiThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 9.655 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
